retry_reason: A put operation that decrements refcount; if the refcount was zero, it's a use-after-free bug; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: Put wrapper for struct backing_aio. Decrements the reference count via refcount_dec_and_test and, if the refcount reaches zero, releases the associated file via fput and frees the backing_aio object from the backing_aio_cachep slab cache. This function represents the release side of the lifetime: each call releases one reference previously acquired via a matching get or allocation. After this function returns, the caller must not use the aio pointer anymore, as the object may have been freed.
